title: thelypteris invisa
intro: Thelypteris invisa, also known as the invasive lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris invisa include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a poultice or compress to apply locally to affected areas.
